title: チームステータスランクアップ！

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer! You've been really giving it your
all, haven't you?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The academy has decided to reward you and your
team for your hard work!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
We've upgraded your training facilities so you
can train more efficiently!
